reasoning: Wicked: For Good effectively has around 40 days in 2025 to accumulate its calendar gross (releasing November 21, 2025). It needs to surpass massive 2025 hits like A Minecraft Movie and Lilo & Stitch, which are both already around the $423M+ mark domestically as of August. While Wicked Part 1 managed to gross ~$432M in its 2024 calendar window, Part 2 faces immense competition for family audiences and premium screens from Zootopia 2 (releasing Nov 26) and Avatar: Fire and Ash (Dec 19). The difficulty of hitting ~$450M in 40 days under these highly competitive conditions makes it a longshot, aligning closely with recent market estimates around 8%. I estimate a 6% chance it edges out the current frontrunners.
